action.reasoning: Observation: Pi0 model loads but I haven't validated the preprocessor/forward pipeline. The preprocess function needs the right batch format (instruction key name, etc). Analysis: Must test preprocessor with a dummy batch before committing to training. Decision: Write a quick test script to validate preprocessor + forward pass, then if successful, proceed directly to training.
